title: Raw Data Extraction and Risk of Bias Assessment for: Systematic Review of Anti-USAG-1 Therapies
author: Sarfraz, Zain
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Description:  > This dataset contains the underlying extraction data for a systematic review evaluating the efficacy of anti-USAG-1 therapies in oral pathology.The full study extraction matrix (including clinical trial registry identifier and the SYRCLE Risk of Bias assessment scores for the included in vivo preclinical studies.
steps_raw: Description:  > This dataset contains the underlying extraction data for a systematic review evaluating the efficacy of anti-USAG-1 therapies in oral pathology.The full study extraction matrix (including clinical trial registry identifier and the SYRCLE Risk of Bias assessment scores for the included in vivo preclinical studies.
